CREATE TABLE test_table (event_time DateTime64(6, 'UTC')) ENGINE = Memory;
CREATE TABLE another_table (user_id Int64, last_active DateTime64(3, 'UTC')) ENGINE = Memory;
SELECT user_id, toUnixTimestamp64Micro(last_active) FROM another_table WHERE user_id = 1;
WITH (SELECT toDateTime64('2022-02-28 23:59:59.999999', 6, 'UTC')) AS dt64 SELECT toUnixTimestamp64Micro(dt64);
SELECT user_id, toUnixTimestamp64Micro(event_time) AS timestamp FROM test_table JOIN another_table ON event_time > last_active;
